case_title: RICHARD GOLDMAN VS. NOURI AZOUAGO et al*****CASE TRANSFERRED TO ALAMEDA COUNTY*****

docket_entries.description: NTC OF MTN AND MTN TO TRANSFER FOR IMPROPER VENUE AND FOR SANCTIONS, PROOF OF SERVICE, DECLARATION FILED BY DEFENDANT AZOUAOU, NOURREDINE HEARING SET FOR AUG-26-2008 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT NOURREDINE AZOUAOU'S MOTION TO TRANSFER FOR IMPROPER VENUE AND FOR SANCTIONS IS GRANTED. THE EVIDENCE SUGGESTS THAT ANY AGREEMENT BETWEEN PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT WAS ENTERED INTO EITHER IN ALAMEDA OR MARIN, BUT NOT SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AND IT WAS NOT TO BE PREFORMED IN SAN FRANCISCO. THEREFORE, VENUE DOES NOT LIE IN SAN FRANCISCO AND THE CASE IS PROPERLY TRANSFERRED TO ALAMEDA ON DEFENDANT'S REQUEST. REQUESTS FOR SANCTIONS ARE DENIED. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: DIANA CHEN CSR # 11312 (301/PJB)

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Transfer For Improper Venue And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-26-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT NOURREDINE AZOUAOU'S MOTION To Transfer For Improper Venue And For Sanctions IS GRANTED. THE EVIDENCE SUGGESTS THAT ANY AGREEMENT BETWEEN PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT WAS ENTERED INTO EITHER IN ALAMEDA OR MARIN, BUT NOT SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AND IT WAS NOT TO BE PREFORMED IN SAN FRANCISCO. THEREFORE, VENUE DOES NOT LIE IN SAN FRANCISCO AND THE CASE IS PROPERLY TRANSFERRED TO ALAMEDA ON DEFENDANT'S REQUEST. REQUESTS FOR SANCTIONS ARE DENIED. Prevailing party is to prepare a form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Diana Chen CSR # 11312 (301/PJB)
